positive: A minimalist, stylized depiction of a whimsical forest creature—a bioluminescent fox-like spirit—sitting peacefully amongst glowing mushrooms and stylized fern foliage. The fox has an elegant, slender silhouette and is composed of soft, flowing energy lines. Use a deep indigo and teal color palette contrasted with pops of electric lime and gold light. The overall aesthetic should be modern folklore, highly graphic, and suitable for screen printing. Composition must be centered, with strong negative space and clean edges. Cinematic lighting, high contrast, studio shot, vector art quality.
